summary: Frontend regression after restructure (api/axios.js, ThemeContext, Sidebar with theme-toggle, Tasks.jsx replacing ProjectDetail.jsx) and dark-mode addition. All critical flows pass: admin/member login, dashboard stats (4 cards), projects list, create-project modal, project detail (3-column task board, members panel with add/remove, delete-task icons, status pills, NEW TASK), member role correctly hides open-create-project on /projects (count=0), logout (desktop & mobile). Dark mode toggle works on both [data-testid=theme-toggle] (desktop) and [data-testid=theme-toggle-mobile] (mobile): sets document.documentElement[data-theme] to dark/light, persists to localStorage key 'ttm_theme', and survives reload. Both light and dark renders are legible (no white-on-white / dark-on-dark detected by luminance check). Backend was not retested per main agent instruction (no API changes); iteration_1 had 24/24 pytest passes.

issues: Pre-existing dev-only React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' surfaces in console when the user-select dropdown renders; caused by dev instrumentation, not user-visible. Same as iteration_1.

action_items: Optional: silence the dev-only <option><span> hydration warning (carryover from iteration_1).
No code action required for dark mode — implementation is correct and persistent.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx is clean: single source of truth, useEffect writes both DOM attribute and localStorage, SSR-safe initial state.
App.js order is correct — ThemeProvider wraps AuthProvider (theme should not depend on auth).
Sidebar.jsx exposes both theme-toggle (desktop) and theme-toggle-mobile data-testids — good for testability.
api/axios.js correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix, no hardcoded URL.
Tasks.jsx contains both AddMemberRow and the task board; consider splitting once it grows >700 lines.
CSS uses var(--ttm-*) tokens consistently in dark mode; legacy hex utility overrides via [data-theme=dark] are working — verified visually.
Frontend stores JWT in localStorage 'ttm_token' (acceptable for MVP).
seed_data_creation: None this iteration; reused 'Website Relaunch' and 'UI_TEST_Project' seeded earlier.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode toggle works on both desktop ([data-testid=theme-toggle]) and mobile ([data-testid=theme-toggle-mobile]) — sets html[data-theme] and persists to localStorage 'ttm_theme'. Theme persists across reloads. Member account currently has 0 visible projects (was removed during prior testing) — re-add via admin UI if you need to test member-on-project-detail role hiding (verified working in iteration_1: OCT/DT/RM/AMS all 0). Backend untouched since iteration_1; pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
